known_bugs.title: SuperAdmin @RequiresPermission bypass broken (10 endpoints 403 for SA)
known_bugs.evidence: All 9 previously 403'd SA endpoints returned 200 across multiple probes (employees size=20, payroll/runs, payroll/salary-structures, payroll/components, knowledge/templates, fluence/attachments/recent). No 403 observed in network log for SA role.

known_bugs.title: GET /api/v1/fluence/activities returns 500
known_bugs.evidence: W5 prior run observed 403 (RBAC changed). W10 confirms endpoint no longer 500 but fluence/wall still shows 'Unable to load activity feed' fallback. NOTE: downgraded from 500 to 403-or-fallback — partial fix; backend-dev should verify expected status.

known_bugs.title: GET /api/v1/workflow/inbox/count timeout (30s) / 503
known_bugs.evidence: Multiple 200 responses captured in network log (<2s each) across sidebar loads on /dashboard, /helpdesk/tickets, /contracts, /approvals/inbox. No 503 or timeout observed.

known_bugs.title: /helpdesk/tickets — <Link> renders as <span>, no anchor nav
known_bugs.evidence: DOM probe found 14 <a> anchors in tbody (a[href^='/helpdesk/tickets/']) vs prior run's 0 anchors / 7 span rows. Ticket subject cells are now real Link anchors.

known_bugs.title: /performance/okr — OKR endpoints hang >10s; skeleton never resolves
known_bugs.evidence: Navigated to /performance/okr; /api/v1/okr/objectives/my and /api/v1/okr/company/objectives remained 'pending' in network log after 15s. Renderer froze (CDP Runtime.evaluate timeout 45s) — consistent with prior F-05 hang symptom. Run 2 W4 reported HOLDS but W10 observes regression; file under re-opened F-05.

known_bugs.title: /helpdesk/tickets — EMPLOYEE gets Access Denied (violates 'every user is employee')
known_bugs.evidence: W10 is SUPER_ADMIN; cannot exercise EMPLOYEE role. Needs EMPLOYEE worker for verification. V130 migration (add_helpdesk_ticket_permissions_to_employee) exists as uncommitted fix — likely resolved but unverified from SA session.

known_bugs.title: /approvals/inbox returns 503 for EMPLOYEE before redirect
known_bugs.evidence: SA session; /approvals/inbox loaded 200 for SA (no 503). EMPLOYEE reproduction requires role change.

known_bugs.title: HR_ADMIN 403 cluster on NU-Hire (recruitment/candidates, employees, letter templates)
known_bugs.evidence: W10 is SUPER_ADMIN; /recruitment endpoints load 200 for SA. Likely subsumed by F-01 architectural fix but needs HR_ADMIN verification.

known_bugs.title: /recruitment/jobs/new returns 404 (route missing)
known_bugs.evidence: Navigated as SA; page h1 renders 'Page not found' / Next.js 404. Route has not been added. Break Hire-to-Retire S1.step1 still active.

known_bugs.title: /payroll/structures and /payroll/runs render empty <main> for SA
known_bugs.evidence: Subsumed by F-01 fix. Both pages now render content with API 200s. Downstream symptom resolved.

known_bugs.title: /employees?page=N — URL param ignored, always page=0
known_bugs.evidence: Navigated to /employees?page=1; network log shows GET /api/v1/employees?page=1&size=20 (not page=0). URL-driven pagination honored.

known_bugs.title: /contracts View buttons do not navigate (span instead of anchor)
known_bugs.evidence: DOM probe: 3 tbody rows, 3 <a> anchors with href^='/contracts/', 3 'View' anchors, 0 'View' buttons. Real Link anchors present.

notes: Login path: demo card 'Fayaz M' succeeded (email/password rate-limit + lockout risk avoided).
F-05 regression: prior Run 2 W4 reported HOLDS; W10 observed hang recurrence. Recommend re-dispatch backend-dev to profile OkrService under load.
F-02: previously 500, now fallback/403-ish — partial fix; backend-dev should confirm expected semantics for SA.
3 CANNOT_REPRO bugs (F-06/F-07/F-08) need EMPLOYEE and HR_ADMIN workers with isolated credentials.
